summary: Iteration 124: Verified download.js migration to centralized downloadFile() utility and WhatsApp internal PDF generation fix. All 27 backend API tests passed. All frontend pages load correctly with export buttons present.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Login flow works (username: admin, password: admin123)
VERIFIED: GET /api/reports/party-ledger/pdf returns valid PDF (Content-Type: application/pdf, PDF magic bytes)
VERIFIED: GET /api/reports/party-ledger/excel returns valid Excel (PK zip header)
VERIFIED: POST /api/whatsapp/send-party-ledger generates PDF internally via _generate_party_ledger_pdf_bytes() - no HTTP self-call

VERIFIED: All export endpoints work (CMR vs DC, Season P&L, DC Entries, MSP Payments, Gunny Bags, Milling Report, FRK Purchases, Byproduct Sales, Paddy Custody, Sale Book, Cash Book, Truck Payments, Daily Report)
VERIFIED: download.js correctly implements downloadFile() for GET requests and downloadPost() for POST requests
VERIFIED: Electron detection via window.electronAPI or window.ELECTRON_API_URL
VERIFIED: Browser fallback uses blob + anchor tag download approach
VERIFIED: All frontend pages load with Excel/PDF export buttons (Entries, Reports, DC, Milling, Cash Book, Staff, Payments, Vouchers)
VERIFIED: Settings page loads with 5 sub-tabs (Branding, GST, Stock, Messaging, Data)
VERIFIED: WhatsApp settings endpoint returns api_key_masked field
VERIFIED: tmpfiles.org URL uses https (not http) in whatsapp.py

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI pages verified with export buttons)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 124 tested critical fixes: 1) All inline blob downloads across 8+ components migrated to centralized downloadFile() utility in /app/frontend/src/utils/download.js, 2) WhatsApp Party Ledger PDF now generated internally via shared _generate_party_ledger_pdf_bytes() function instead of HTTP self-call, 3) tmpfiles URL fixed from http to https. All APIs working, all UI tabs loading correctly with export buttons. App version is v53.7.0.

party_ledger_pdf.details: GET /api/reports/party-ledger/pdf returns valid PDF with correct Content-Type and magic bytes

whatsapp_send_party_ledger.details: POST /api/whatsapp/send-party-ledger generates PDF internally (no HTTP self-call)

frontend_pages.details: All pages load with export buttons: Entries, Reports, DC, Milling, Cash Book, Staff, Payments, Vouchers, Settings

download_utility_verification.downloadFile_function: Uses window.open for Electron, blob+anchor for browser
download_utility_verification.downloadPost_function: Uses IPC saveFile for Electron, blob+anchor for browser

whatsapp_internal_pdf_verification.change: Now calls _generate_party_ledger_pdf_bytes() directly instead of HTTP self-call
